blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,402 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
